title: Onboarding - Check onboarding screens UI
scenario: Verify the UI of all onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal) matches the Figma design reference.
steps: Start the app for the first time
Progress through onboarding until reaching the "Organized" screen
Verify the Organized page UI matches the Figma design
Verify the Up-to-Date page UI matches the Figma design
Verify the Personal page UI matches the Figma design
expected: All onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal) display UI elements matching the Figma design reference.
